role_title: Strategic Business Operations Manager - Community Support

location.office_time_required: occasional work at an Airbnb office or attendance at offsites, as agreed to with your manager

level_signals: 10+ years experience managing large scale operations and strategy in roles with increasing responsibility
Reports to Director of Global Community Support Business Operations
Base pay range $168K-$210K USD consistent with senior individual contributor or manager level
Engagement with senior and executive stakeholders

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 10+ years experience managing large scale operations and strategy in roles with increasing responsibility.
Experience with process design and optimization, strategic operations and customer support strategies.
Experience working in global/matrixed environment with the ability to solve problems and influence cross-functional teams.
Executive presentation skills with the ability to develop a strategy, communicate it clearly and get buy-in and support to execute.
Excellent stakeholder management skills - including proven experience working with senior leaders on global programs.
Outstanding written and verbal communication and presentation skills; ability to articulate a vision, strategy, ideas and decisions clearly and succinctly.
Proven experience in a role requiring high-attention to detail and organization skills with a proven track record of leading/driving results at scale.
Ability to thrive in ambiguity in a fast-paced, hyper-growth organization.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with a proven track record for using data to develop and implement strategic initiatives and drive key business decisions.
Proficiency in leveraging AI tools and technologies to drive operational efficiency, enhance decision-making and scale program outcomes.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience using SQL, Python and/or Tableau is preferred.
Operations, Management Consulting or Financial/analytics background preferred.

scope.surface: Global Goodwill Program within Community Support — covering tens of millions of customer interactions yearly across phone, messaging, chat, and social media
primary_metrics_inferred: Goodwill budget adherence and operational expense targets
Customer satisfaction (CSAT) metrics tied to goodwill initiatives
Program operational effectiveness and usage audit results
Global rollout completion and governance adherence
core_responsibilities: Design and lead the global goodwill program strategy, operational design, and implementation frameworks
Be the main point of contact driving core product and policy initiatives related to goodwill extension
Define and lead strategy and roadmap for the CS Goodwill Program balancing priorities against business and financial goals
Build an operating management system to track program performance across a global network of partner sites
Drive continuous improvement and innovation in goodwill program initiatives
Establish metrics to measure the success of goodwill initiatives and tune to improve customer satisfaction
Drive the Goodwill budget targeting process in partnership with finance
Report on operational effectiveness of Goodwill programs using data-driven insights
Assess and mitigate risks associated with goodwill practices and compliance with business policies
Liaise with Community Support teams to implement and monitor goodwill programs and provide leadership readouts
Manage programs across outsourced partnerships through cross-functional collaboration
Collaborate on communication and rollout plans globally

compensation.equity_form: eligible for bonus, equity, benefits, and Employee Travel Credits

green_flags: Clear program ownership with high strategic visibility (reports to Director)
Equity and bonus mentioned in addition to base
Broad and well-defined cross-functional scope signals organizational importance of the role
Program has real commercial and human impact at scale (2B+ guest arrivals globally)
red_flags: Must reside in a state where Airbnb has a registered entity — excluded states list is evolving and could limit remote candidates
Visa sponsorship status not explicitly addressed — unclear for non-US candidates
Role requires managing a global goodwill budget; financial accountability is high-stakes without explicit finance team support clarity
'Job titles may span more than one career level' language suggests comp and leveling may be negotiated downward

Role described as 'Business Operations Manager' but responsibilities are more akin to a Senior Program Manager or Strategy & Ops lead — archetype defaulted to BizOps / Strategy & Ops with secondary Program Manager
